```{r}
#| label: part-grants-total
#| results: asis
.grants <- read.csv("../data/Grant_income.csv", check.names = FALSE)
cat(sprintf(
  "**Total Research Income**: approximately %s in direct awards as PI or Co-I across %d projects (source: `data/Grant_income.csv`).  \n",
  scales::comma(sum(.grants$Amount, na.rm = TRUE), prefix = "£"),
  nrow(.grants)
))
```
